detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use intc driver.

sect1.title: xintc_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XIntc driver directly. This example shows the usage of the intc driver.

sect1.title: xintc_low_level_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XIntc driver directly. This example shows the usage of the low level-0 driver, interface of the Intc driver.

sect1.title: xintc_tapp_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XIntc driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest on the Intc driver and testapp gen utility uses this file to perform the self test and setup of Intc for interrupts.
